meaning: n.[体]马拉松赛跑(全长42,1954米),耐力的考验
examples: The interview was a real marathon.
It felt as though he had run a marathon.
The marathon is a severe test of stamina.
Even shoppers not planning a holiday meal will find a trip to the 36-hour marathon market worthwhile.
One of the most memorable events was the marathon, which took place during a July heatwave.
